message:
test(wal): add crash-loop replay determinism test for WAL recovery (bd-26631.3)

Verify that WAL recovery produces identical results across repeated
restart attempts, catching non-deterministic replay bugs before they
corrupt production databases. Tests three scenarios: clean control
restart loop, torn data frame with missing FEC, and torn commit frame
with missing FEC. Each scenario writes a fixture WAL, applies the
specified fault injection, then replays recovery 6 times and asserts
frame counts, commit boundaries, and content digests are identical
across all attempts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
